Package model

Class AbstractCardCollection

java.lang.Object
model.AbstractCardCollection
Direct Known Subclasses:
AnimalCollection, CarCollection, FoodCollection
public abstract class AbstractCardCollection extends Object
Class represents a generic collection class for abstract card objects

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    AbstractCardCollection(int num, String newCardBack)
    AbstractCardCollection constructor for Card Collection class initializes Collections - an array list of Card objects

  • Constructor Details

    • AbstractCardCollection

      public AbstractCardCollection(int num, String newCardBack)
      AbstractCardCollection constructor for Card Collection class initializes Collections - an array list of Card objects
      Parameters:
      int - Integer dictates size of images(front/back of card)

    • getBackOfCard

      public String getBackOfCard()
      getBackOfCard : getter for back of card
      Returns:
      backOfCard : String that represents the back of the card

      getArrayList Returns the ArrayList with Card objects

      col - : int Col that represents the number of colums

      public int getSize()
      getSize returns the size of the deck
      Returns:
      int size of deck

    • addCard

      public void addCard(Card card)
      addCard adds a Card object to the deck
      Parameters:
      card - Card object that will get added to the deck

    • addCard

      public void addCard(String name, String type, String file, int scale)
      addCard Creates a Card object from the given parameters and adds it to the Deck
      Parameters:
      name - String reprensents the name
      type - String reprensents the type
      file - String reprensents the name of the file
      num - int reprensents the number of columns that the cards are going to be placed in

    • getCard

      public Card getCard(int index)
      getCard gets a Card object from the deck at the given index
      Parameters:
      index - int represents the index of a Card in the deck
      Returns:

    • getDiffDeck

      public ArrayList<Card> getDiffDeck(int number, int scale)
      getDiffDeck creates a new deck with 'num' number of Cards and shuffles them, the original deck is still available
      Parameters:
      number - int represents the wanted amount of Cards
      Returns:
      ArrayList a new Deck with the wanted number of cards

    • shuffle

      public ArrayList<Card> shuffle()
      shuffle Shuffles the deck
      Returns:
      ArrayList a shuffled version of the Deck

    • printCards

      public void printCards()
      printCards prints out the cards in the Deck

    • getNewDeck

      public abstract AbstractCardCollection getNewDeck(int number, int scale)
      getNewDeck returns a new deck with 'number' of cards wanted
      Parameters:
      number - int represents the size of the new deck
      Returns:
      AbstractCardCollection the new deck of size 'number'
